license: PD-US-GOV (Farm Security Administration / Office of War Information)
rights_holder: Photograph by Russell Lee (1903–1986), made on assignment for the FSA. Public domain as a work of a U.S. federal employee.
attribution: Russell Lee, "Easter morning on the Southside of Chicago, Illinois." April 1941. Farm Security Administration / Office of War Information Photograph Collection, Library of Congress (LC-USF34-038825-D / LC-DIG-ppmsc-00256). PD-US-GOV (FSA/OWI).
subject: Russell Lee's FSA work. Lee contributed two plates to The Family of Man (#84 Family Activities and #178 Work B in the Master Checklist; our photo-0080 and photo-0170 — both FSA / Bureau of Mines attributed in the checklist). Plate-level identification of this specific image with our photo-0080 or photo-0170 has not been verified against a Tier-1 source as of 2026-04-25; this image is offered as a representative example of Lee's FSA documentary work.
